name: Cayenne Shrimp with Lemon
recipeIngredient: 1 pound medium shrimp, shelled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook rice according to package directions, omitting any added salt.
2. While the rice is cooking, spray a large nonstick skillet with nonstick cooking spray.
3. Heat the skillet over medium-high heat until it is hot.
4. Add shrimp and cook for 2 to 5 minutes or until they turn pink, stirring frequently.
5. Reduce the heat to medium-low.
6. Add margarine, paprika, salt, and ground red pepper to the skillet. Cook and stir until the margarine melts and coats the shrimp completely.
7. Add lemon juice and stir to combine thoroughly.
8. To serve, arrange cooked rice on a serving platter. Spoon the shrimp mixture over the rice.
9. Serve with lemon wedges.
